alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (54 nmol, 30 min, 25°C)
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (54 nmol, 30 min, 25°C)
cleavage agent: digested with 0.9 µg LysC (Wako; cat #129–02541) overnight at 37°C
instrument: The peptide mixes were analyzed using a LTQ-Orbitrap XL (secretome)
labeling: performed a total proteome comparison of growing versus starved cells by stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
